title: Darling Ingredients Inc. Converts Wastewater Emissions Into Renewable Natural Gas, Cutting Scope 1 Emissions
content: Darling Ingredients Inc. , the worldâ€™s leading company turning food waste into sustainable products and producer of renewable energy, today announced that it has begun making renewable natural gas (RNG) derived from wastewater at the companyâ€™s Dublin, Georgia, rendering facility, reducing Scope 1 emissions while creating a new revenue stream. In partnership with GreenGasUSA, the RNG is injected into the City of Dublinâ€™s natural gas distribution system and purchased by the Municipal Gas Authority of Georgia and integrated into the existing natural gas energy grid, generating thermal energy credits.
author: Analysts Account
